briefdescription.para: Insufficient funds for a transaction.
Error writing data into the database.
Input transaction hash is invalid.
Chain ID is invalid.
Token ID is invalid.
Informed Token ID doesn't match initialized ID.
The calculated Processing cost was negative.
Processing information missing on JSON file.
JSON cannot be parsed>.
JSON params for blocks incorrect or missing>.
No processor for this type.
Couldn't get price of gnus.
Transactions aren't ready.
GeniusNode Error class.

memberdef.argsstring: (const DevConfig_st &dev_config, const char *eth_private_key, bool autodht=true, bool isprocessor=true, uint16_t base_port=40001, bool is_full_node=false, bool use_upnp=true)
memberdef.name: New

memberdef.argsstring: (uint64_t amount, const std::string &transaction_hash, const std::string &chainid, TokenID tokenid, std::chrono::milliseconds timeout=std::chrono::milliseconds(TIMEOUT_MINT))
memberdef.name: MintTokens

briefdescription.para: Mints tokens by converting a string amount to fixed-point representation.

parameterdescription.para: Numeric value with amount in Minion Tokens (1e-6 GNUS Token)
Transaction hash on the source chain.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint64_t amount, const std::string &destination, TokenID token_id, std::chrono::milliseconds timeout)
memberdef.name: TransferFunds

briefdescription.para: Formats a fixed-point amount into a human-readable string.

parameterdescription.para: Optional token identifier: – empty: default (minion to GNUS) formatting – matches DevConfig.TokenID: child-token formatting – otherwise: returns Error::TOKEN_ID_MISMATCH

simplesect.para: Outcome result with the formatted string in GNUS or an error.

briefdescription.para: Parses a human-readable string into a fixed-point amount.

parameterdescription.para: String representation of an amount in GNUS.
Optional token identifier: – empty: default (GNUS to minion) parsing – matches DevConfig.TokenID: child-token parsing – otherwise: returns Error::TOKEN_ID_MISMATCH

simplesect.para: Outcome result with the parsed amount in Minion Tokens (1e-6 GNUS) or an error.

memberdef.type: outcome::result< std::map< std::string, std::map< int64_t, double > > >
memberdef.definition: outcome::result< std::map< std::string, std::map< int64_t, double > > > sgns::GeniusNode::GetCoinPriceByDate
memberdef.name: GetCoinPriceByDate

memberdef.type: outcome::result< std::map< std::string, std::map< int64_t, double > > >
memberdef.definition: outcome::result< std::map< std::string, std::map< int64_t, double > > > sgns::GeniusNode::GetCoinPricesByDateRange
memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< std::string > &tokenIds, int64_t from, int64_t to)
memberdef.name: GetCoinPricesByDateRange

briefdescription.para: Set the authorized full node address for blockchain genesis verification.

parameterdescription.para: The public address that is authorized to create genesis blocks

briefdescription.para: Get the current authorized full node public address.

simplesect.para: The authorized full node public address

memberdef.argsstring: (const DevConfig_st &dev_config, const char *eth_private_key, bool autodht, bool isprocessor, uint16_t base_port, bool is_full_node, bool use_upnp)
memberdef.name: GeniusNode

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &escrow_path, const SGProcessing::TaskResult &taskresult, std::shared_ptr< crdt::AtomicTransaction > crdt_transaction, std::chrono::milliseconds timeout=std::chrono::milliseconds(TIMEOUT_ESCROW_PAY))
memberdef.name: PayEscrow

briefdescription.para: Parse and sum all "block_len" values from the JSON.

simplesect.para: outcome::result<uint64_t> with total bytes, or an error code.
